title: ARCHIVED – Income Tax Package for Non-Residents and Deemed Residents of Canada for 2023 - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Income Tax Package for Non-Residents and Deemed Residents of Canada for 2023
- Income Tax and Benefit Guide for Non-Residents and Deemed Residents of Canada
- Income Tax and Benefit Return for Non-Residents and Deemed Residents of Canada
- Federal Worksheet (for non-residents and deemed residents of Canada )
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner (for non-residents of Canada)
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses)
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment
- Schedule 8 - Quebec Pension Plan Contributions (for QC only)
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 10 - Employment Insurance (EI) and Provincial Parental Insurance Plan (PPIP) Premiums (for non-residents of Canada)
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts and Canada Training Credit (for non-residents of Canada)
- Schedule 12 - Multigenerational Home Renovation Tax Credit
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings
- Schedule 15 - FHSA Contributions, Transfers and Activities
- Schedule A - Statement of World Income (for non-residents and deemed residents of Canada)
- Schedule B - Allowable Amount of Federal Non-Refundable Tax Credits (for non-residents of Canada)
- Schedule C - Electing under Section 217 of the Income Tax Act (for non-residents of Canada)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
